---
title: "Cutner-Nina_Intermediate-elective-02"
author: "Nina Cutner"
format: pdf
date: May 12, 2026
execute: 
  messages: false
  warning: false
---

# Set up

## Packages

```{r}
#| label: Packages

# data visualization
library(tidyverse)

# cleaning column names
library(janitor)

# working with file paths
library(here)

# working with dates
library(lubridate)

# improved text rendering in ggplot
library(ggtext)

# direct labeling for plots
library(ggrepel)
```

## Data

```{r}
#| label: Data

# read in vegetation data
veg <- read_csv(here("data", "veg copy.csv"))
```
